909 PAIN_SLP_CD PAIN_SLP_CD J0510 Pain Effect on Sleep CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency at which the resident's pain has made it hard to sleep at night over the last five days. 1=Rarely or not at all
2=Occasionally
